titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Insignia Films Lindbergh Documentary Collection

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday November 29, 2024 at 05:03

did.abstract: The Insignia Films Lindbergh documentary collection consists of films and sound recordings created and used for a biography of Anne and Charles Lindbergh for the American Experience television program produced on public television.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The material is unprocessed and may contain sensitive information or be in a physical state that would prohibit use. Researchers wishing to request access should email beinecke.library@yale.edu requesting specific box numbers in order to initiate the review process, which may take several weeks.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright status for collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Insignia Films Lindbergh Documentary Collection (MS 1767). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The Insignia Films Lindbergh documentary collection consists of films and sound recordings created and used for a biography of Anne and Charles Lindbergh for the American Experience television program produced on public television.

did.materialspec: Static is present. Existing splices. Ink edge numbers.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Audiovisual material: Restricted fragile. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.
